quality.rationale: 纯数学基矢与对偶基定义题，无具体物理场景，且附带的解答与题干完全无关导致完整性受损

origin.question:
# Problem 8.1.
(a) A spacetime has coordinates $\mathbf{x}^a$ with basis vectors $\partial/\partial \mathbf{x}^a$ and basis one-forms $\widetilde{\mathrm{dx}}^a$ . What are the values of:
$$
< \widetilde {\mathbf {d x}}^{0}, \partial / \partial \mathbf {x}^{0} >, < \widetilde {\mathbf {d x}}^{2}, \partial / \partial \mathbf {x}^{3} >, (\partial / \partial \mathbf {x}^{0}) \cdot (\partial / \partial \mathbf {x}^{1}), \widetilde {\mathbf {d x}}^{0} \cdot \widetilde {\mathbf {d x}}^{1}, \widetilde {\mathbf {d x}}^{0} \cdot \widetilde {\mathbf {d x}}^{0}?
$$
origin.answer: $\\langle \\widetilde{\\mathrm{d}x}^0, \\partial/\\partial x^0 \\rangle = 1$, $\\langle \\widetilde{\\mathrm{d}x}^2, \\partial/\\partial x^3 \\rangle = 0$, $\\partial/\\partial x^0 \\cdot \\partial/\\partial x^1 = g_{01}$, $\\widetilde{\\mathrm{d}x}^0 \\cdot \\widetilde{\\mathrm{d}x}^1 = g^{01}$, $\\widetilde{\\mathrm{d}x}^0 \\cdot \\widetilde{\\mathrm{d}x}^0 = g_{00}$
origin.solution:
# Solution 8.1.
$$
\mathbf {d} \left(\mathscr {L}_{\mathbf {X}} \tilde {\mathbf {U}}\right) = \mathscr {L}_{\mathbf {X}} (\mathbf {d} \tilde {\mathbf {U}}).
$$
The generalization of this method from 1-form to p-form is straightforward.
